observedEvaluationIterations: Initial run: action 82.67%, domain 93.00%, unsupported understanding 88.00%.
Second run: action 95.67%, domain 97.00%, unsupported understanding 96.25%.
Third run: action 95.67%, domain 97.00%, unsupported understanding 97.50%.
Final run: action 96.00%, domain 97.67%, unsupported understanding 100.00%.
behaviorDifference: Every recommendation starts task-frame.v1 semantic parsing in shadow mode and records sanitized differences and token/latency telemetry. The existing parser and IntentEnvelope remain authoritative, and the full legacy regression suite stays unchanged.
knownLimitations: The deterministic phase-2 parser establishes the protocol and offline gate; an injected bounded provider may later improve open-ended language coverage.
The 300-case startup set is not an independent 1000-case holdout and does not support a public 95% coverage claim.
Entity fields contain raw typed mentions in phase 2; canonical entity and game-concept linking is delivered in phase 3.
rollback: Revert 2d16226. No schema or production data migration is required because IntentEnvelope and the legacy execution chain remain authoritative.
